   "reasoning": "I'm at my wit's end with 52 kids in my class and no support, so I need more staff, not more paperwork. Hiring new teachers is the only way to reduce my workload, which is currently suffocating me. I also need some breathing room with incentives that actually help, not just empty promises. Transparency reports are just a waste of my time, filling out forms instead of teaching and helping kids like Alex, who's been struggling since his parents' divorce.",
   "confidence": 0.95
